description: Make an explicit decision on whether public marketing/legal pages remain in Next static generation or migrate to the same Vite/static setup after the patient app split. Evaluate SEO needs, content workflow, OpenGraph/sitemap/robots generation, design reuse, build/deploy complexity, and the cost of keeping two frontend toolchains. This ticket should produce a concrete recommendation and follow-up tickets if needed; it does not have to migrate marketing pages. Acceptance criteria: decision is documented; tradeoffs are captured; route ownership is clear for /, /about, /privacy, /terms, public medication/category pages, and patient app routes; no patient-app cutover is blocked by unresolved marketing-site preferences.
title: Decide future of marketing site after patient app split
